title: leontodon hispidus var. dubius
intro: Leontodon hispidus var. dubius, also known as hairy hawk's beard, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to alleviate various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Leontodon hispidus var. dubius can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
